_meta.disclaimer: Estimated ranges for illustration only. Actual rates are determined through underwriting and may vary.

mortgage_protection.tobacco_note: Multiply non-smoker rate x1.5 for tobacco users

final_expense.note: Industry typical. No agency-specific rates available for MVP.

family_life.note: Term life is typically the least expensive per dollar of coverage. No carrier-specific rates available for MVP display.

business_protection.note: Highly variable by business size, industry, and coverage type. No generic range appropriate without underwriting context.
